classes._b70_stub_note: B70 stub: clone of archmage.dat (Arcist is CPR093 Archmage variant). Weapon costs pending ICE extraction.
B70 stub: clone of barde.dat (both SEMI Mentalism, social focus). Weapon costs pending ICE extraction.
B70 stub: clone of cprime.dat (both NON-caster, social/leadership, combat-capable). Weapon costs pending ICE extraction.

_metadata.structure: Each class has a [filename.dat] header followed by cost values. Cost values correspond to skills in COMP.DAT order.
_metadata.cost_encoding: Values represent development point costs. Pattern varies by skill type: single values for most skills, multi-value for progression costs (e.g., 2/5 = 2 pts for rank 1, 5 for rank 2+).
